script_details: Created all 8 core SpellCast DB tables with FK constraints.
Seeded 4 houses, 5 students, 4 courses, 1 exam sitting with results, potion attempts, spell stints, and OWL standings.
Added has_duel and duel_date to exam_sitting.
Created duel_result table with unique constraints.
Added duel_marks to owl_standing and created update procedure.
Migrated legacy contact strings to structured columns.
Removed legacy columns and added getter procedure.
Parsed legacy brew times into numeric columns.
Cleaned up legacy potion columns and created display view.
